economic_notes: First Nation operates Pelly Haylands Holdings Corp. and Band Land Holdings Corp. for economic development. Agricultural leases within Key Band Land Holdings Corp. secure multiple RBC loans. COVID-19 impacted operations; additional government assistance received. Contingent land surrender claim (1909 Surrender Claim) and Key Treaty Benefits Claim against Government of Canada with cumulative costs of $1,987,357 financed by loans secured by insurance policies.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Auditor's report includes Emphasis of Matter - Contingent Asset regarding 1909 Surrender Claim and Key Treaty Benefits Claim against Government of Canada; loans of $1,987,357 obtained to fund claims secured by insurance policies. Five entities consolidated including CMHC Housing, Pelly Haylands Holdings Corp., Band Land Holdings Corp., and two Pelly Haylands accounts; Key First Nation Pelly Hayland Trust excluded as controlled by Trustees. Some consolidated subsidiaries have December 31, 2020 year end. Six new housing units under CMHC Section 95 program committed. Audit report dated after required July 29, 2021 filing deadline - First Nation in violation of filing requirement. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC/FNIHB ($4,832,039) + CMHC ($165,088) + Yorkton Tribal Council ($649,410) = $5,646,537; restricted cash total includes current ($1,168,326) and long-term ($155,899) restricted cash.
